assertions.assertion: Configures UseForwardedHeaders with ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedFor and ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedProto
assertions.rationale: Shows UseForwardedHeaders with both XForwardedFor and XForwardedProto

assertions.assertion: Places UseForwardedHeaders before UseAuthentication in the middleware pipeline
assertions.rationale: UseForwardedHeaders is placed before UseAuthentication with explicit comment

assertions.assertion: Configures UsePathBase('/app') for the sub-path mount
Mentions SameSite cookie configuration (Lax for cross-site IDP) as a potential contributing factor
assertions.rationale: Explains SameSite cookie issue and recommends Lax for cross-site IDP
